item.title: Applications — What You Can Build With a Brain
item.description: Applications Distillary turns sources into a queryable, verifiable knowledge graph.

item.title: Deep Research Agent — Answering Hard Questions from the Brain
item.description: Deep Research Agent The research agent answers questions by iteratively searching the brain — going back and forth, following links, checking evidence, cross-referencing sources — until it finds a comprehensive, well-evidenced answer.

item.title: Argumentation Layer — How Distillary Captures Evidence
item.description: Argumentation Layer Distillary doesn’t just capture what authors claim — it captures why they believe it, how strong the evidence is, and what they argued against.

item.title: Managing Multiple Brains
item.description: Multiple Brains Each brain is a self-contained knowledge vault focused on a domain.

item.title: Quick Start
item.description: Quick start Process your first source into a brain vault in ~15 minutes.

item.title: Agent Retrieval Skill
item.description: Agent retrieval skill A self-contained skill for querying any published Distillary brain.

item.title: Command Reference
item.description: Command Reference All commands use /dist:command-name. Each reads its agent definition file — consistent behavior every time.

item.title: How It Works
item.description: How Distillary works The insight Every source (book, video, article, regulatory framework) has an argument structure: a central thesis supported by a hierarchy of claims backed by evidence.

item.title: Architecture
item.description: Architecture Three layers .claude/ The brain — agents and skills that do the thinking distillary/ The hands — Python utilities agents call brain/ The output — Obsidian vault with all knowledge .claude/ (16 agents, 9 skills) Agents are individual workers with specific models: Haiku (11 agents): extra...

item.title: Publishing Your Brain
item.description: Publishing your brain Share your brain as a static website with graph view, search, and an agent-queryable API.
